title: oxalis nelsonii
intro: Oxalis nelsonii, also known as Nelson's oxalis, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the wood sorrel family. It is native to the western parts of North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The health benefits of Oxalis nelsonii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Oxalis nelsonii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical use, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
